CONTENT.Honours: IndividualUEFA European Under-19 Championship Team of the Tournament: 2022
CONTENT.Club career: Tchaouna was born in N'Djamena, Chad. He played for youth teams of FC Kronenbourg, Schiltigheim, Strasbourg, and Rennes. He made his professional debut for Rennes on 26 September 2021 in a 1–1 Ligue 1 draw with Bordeaux.On 30 August 2022, Tchaouna joined Dijon on loan.On 31 August 2023, Tchaouna signed a three-year contract with Serie A club Salernitana. During the 2023–24 season, he was one of the key players of the team, despite their eventual relegation to Serie B, having scored six goals and four assists in 35 appearances in all competitions.On 1 July 2024, Tchaouna joined Serie A club Lazio on a permanent deal, for a reported €8 million fee.
CONTENT.Personal life: Loum's brother Haroun is also a professional footballer. He plays for the Chad national team.
CONTENT.External links: Stade Rennais F.C. profileLoum Tchaouna at the French Football Federation
CONTENT.International career: Born in Chad, Tchaouna moved to France at a young age. He is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Loum Tchaouna (born 8 September 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie A club Lazio. Born in Chad, Tchaouna represents France at international level.
